hero.eyebrow: AI tailor made for leadership coaching
hero.headline: Bitesized leadership support everyday
hero.sub: Human First AI is a leadership platform that extends leadership programs into daily decisions, conversations, and challenges.

problem.headline: Behaviour doesn't change in programs. It changes in how leaders act every day.
problem.body: Using AI leadership coaching, micro-learning, and peer accountability, we support leaders in real situations — giving them clarity and direction to navigate pressure, complexity, and constant change. That's where most leadership development breaks down. The gap is expensive: slower decisions, disengaged teams, and leaders falling back into old patterns. We close that gap. By making behaviour visible and supported daily, leaders don't just learn, they act differently. Organisations see clearer decisions, less friction in teams, and leaders who don't fall back into old patterns when pressure hits.

stat1.label: of senior leaders show signs of stress and exhaustion, yet most never seek support

stat2.label: lost globally each year to leadership performance gaps and organizational disengagement

stat3.label: of organizational transformations fail — leadership behaviour gaps are the leading hidden cause

insight.headline: Not more workshops. Daily practice.
insight.body: Most leadership development ends in the training room. Real behaviour change happens in the meeting, the difficult conversation, the high-pressure decision. Human First AI bridges that gap — delivering AI coaching, micro-learning, and peer accountability inside the workday, where it actually matters.

eve.headline: Your AI coach for sustainable leadership.
eve.body: Eve is the AI leadership coach at the heart of Human First AI. She combines clinical coaching methodology with the daily habits that science shows actually change behaviour — supporting leaders in real situations, not just training rooms.
eve.cap1: Personalized daily check-in and reflection prompts
eve.cap4: Aggregated team performance insights for HR and leadership

pillars.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
pillars.sub: Four integrated capabilities that work together — every day.

pillar1.title: Daily Intelligence
pillar1.body: 60-second check-ins reveal mood, energy, and risk signals before they become crises.

pillar2.title: Ask Eve
pillar2.body: On-demand coaching for real leadership challenges — available at 11 pm when it matters most.

pillar3.title: Micro Courses
pillar3.body: Curated micro-modules on resilience, communication, and sustainable performance. 5 minutes, evidence-backed.

pillar4.title: Think Tanks
pillar4.body: Facilitated peer groups for leaders navigating shared challenges — built for trust and candor.

how.headline: Three steps to a resilient organization.

step1.title: Check in
step1.body: Leaders complete a 60-second daily check-in. Eve surfaces patterns invisible to the naked eye.

step2.title: Get coached
step2.body: Eve delivers personalized guidance, micro-learning, and exercises tailored to each leader's state.

step3.title: Build together
step3.body: Peer conversations and team insights transform individual practice into organizational resilience.
